title: UK REACH authorisations for SEA Chromium Trioxide Authorisation Consortium (hard chrome (sub-contract)), 19 February 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation under UK REACH.  Substance name  Chromium trioxide  Authorised uses  Use of chromium trioxide for the hard (functional/engineering) chromium electroplating of engineering components with the purpose of creating a coating to meet specific performance characteristics.  Holder of the authorisation and authorisation number  Surface Engineering Association (SEA) Chromium Trioxide Authorisation Consortium (Hard Chrome (Sub-Contract)):   Armoloy (U.K.) Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/00 BEP Surface Technologies Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/01 British Metal Treatments / FPS Coatings Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/02 Chrometech Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/03 Davies Precision Grinding Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/04 Dynasurf (U.K.) Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/05 East Lancashire Platers Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/06 Firma-Chrome Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/07 GB Plating Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/08 Healey & Sprowson Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/09 John Stokes and Son (Duralloy) Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/10 Langthorpe Plating Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/11 Michrome Electro-Plating Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/12 Nu-Pro Ltd / Magnaghi UK Limited - UKREACH/25/04/13 A.M. Philpot (Hard Chrome) Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/14 Phoenix Electroplating Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/15 R.Wilson & Co. (Platers) Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/16 Reddish Electroplating (Stockport) Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/17 Reis Chrome Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/18 Silchrome Plating Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/19 Walton Plating Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/20 Wedge Plating Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/21 Yorkshire Plating Services Ltd - UKREACH/25/04/22   Date of decision  19 February 2025  "
